configuration.title: Oracle Script Workspace
configuration.keymapProfile.description: Selects the active Oracle Script Workspace keybinding profile.
configuration.connections.description: Oracle connection definitions. Passwords are stored separately in VS Code SecretStorage.
configuration.tnsnamesPaths.description: Paths to tnsnames.ora files to load aliases from.
configuration.clientProfiles.description: Oracle Client profiles that connections can reference. Only one profile can be active in a VS Code extension process.
configuration.clientMode.description: node-oracledb mode. Use thick when connecting to older Oracle Database versions or when Oracle Client features are required.
configuration.oracleClientLibraryDir.des: Oracle Client or Instant Client directory used when clientMode is thick.
configuration.oracleClientConfigDir.desc: Directory containing optional Oracle Net files such as tnsnames.ora and sqlnet.ora.
configuration.maxRows.description: Default maximum rows fetched for each result set. Unlimited fetching will be added after the first stable fetch path.

viewsWelcome.connections.contents:
No Oracle connections configured yet.

[Add Custom Connection](command:oracleWorkspace.addCustomConnection)

After adding a connection, open a `.sql` file and run **Oracle Script Workspace: Switch Connection** to bind it by file name.
